expected.clarification: Ask whether Acme Retail or Beacon Dental should be used as the customer queue for “Damaged Delivery Case.”
response_constraints: Ask one concise question that names the two offered locations: Acme Retail and Beacon Dental.
Do not retrieve the saved preference, invent a third choice, create anything, or claim the request is complete.

prompt: Please create the support case “Damaged Delivery Case” for 2026-08-20. It could be assigned to Acme Retail or Beacon Dental, and I have not chosen between them. The customer queue matters, so do not guess or use my saved default.
